summary: A clip of Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson at a podium in front of a city dump truck bearing an 'ABOLISH ICE' sign, delivering remarks about a snow-plow naming contest. Posted by ICE with text addressing the mayor over the Sheridan Gorman murder. The video itself is an event and press recording. There is no music.
notable_text: 'ABOLISH ICE' sign on dump truck; tweet addresses 'Mayor Johnson' over Sheridan Gorman's murder in Chicago
